ZEDUR_details.name: Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi
ZEDUR_details.description: Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi primarily engages in the production, distribution, and sale of electricity in Turkey. The company generates electricity through hydroelectric and solar power plants. It is also involved in the provision of construction and contracting services for superstructure and infrastructure projects, including mass housing, office buildings, commercial centers, shopping malls, factories, luxury hotels, and holiday resorts, as well as infrastructure, canal, sewer, and tunnel construction projects; and the supply and sale of construction raw materials, intermediate materials, and supplies. The company was formerly known as Utopya Turizm Insaat Isletmecilik Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi in September 2022. Zedur Enerji Elektrik Üretim Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.

KARSN_details.name: Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
KARSN_details.description: Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the production and sale of automotives and related vehicles, and spare parts in Turkey and internationally. It operates through Karsan Branded Products and Spare Parts and other branded sales segments. The company provides passenger cars, trucks, minibuses, buses, hydrogen buses, and electric and diesel buses. It also offers after-sales, marketing, and financial leasing services. The company sells its products under the JEST, ATAK, and STAR brand names. Karsan Otomotiv Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. was incorporated in 1966 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey. The company operates as a subsidiary of Kiraca Holding AS.

THYAO_details.name: Türk Hava Yollari Anonim Ortakligi
THYAO_details.description: Türk Hava Yollari Anonim Ortakligi provides air transport and aircraft technical maintenance services in Turkey and internationally. The company offers domestic and international passenger and cargo air transportation services; repair and maintenance; technical and infrastructure support services related to aviation sector; informatics and technology; cargo and courier transportation; support services; security services; payment systems; health services; management of various investment projects; cabin interior production; catering services; aviation ground handling services; aviation fuel services; It is also involved engine maintenance; and reverse thrust and engine nacelle services, as well as sports activities. The company was incorporated in 1933 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.

ZOREN_details.name: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S.
ZOREN_details.description: Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the trading, distribution, retailing, and sales of electricity in Turkey and internationally. It is also involved in wholesale purchase of electrical energy and capacity and sales activities; engineering and consultancy activities for energy projects; operation and maintenance activities for energy projects and other; maintenance, repair, installation, and sale of charging stations; rental, leasing and other services of motorized light land vehicles and cars without adrives; aggregation, balancing service and other services; solar panel production and inverter sales; carbon selling; and panel production. Zorlu Enerji Elektrik Üretim A.S. was founded in 1993 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
